case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. CYNTHIA W LIANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION REGARDING STATEMENT OF VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100027596) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, CYNTHIA W AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-18-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-17-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-25-2017

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-18-2017 CONTINUED TO NOV-29-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, CYNTHIA W AN INDIVIDUAL $30,627.23 PRINCIPAL, $985.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $31,612.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-29-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
